banner.tagline: Create engaging, AI-powered quizzes from your notes or documents in seconds — effortlessly and accurately.

generate.placeholder: Paste your notes, textbook excerpts, or articles here — GenQuiZ will do the rest...

errors.emptyInput: Please paste some study material or upload a file before generating.
errors.fileRead: Could not read the uploaded file. Please try a different file.
errors.network: Could not reach the server. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.serverError: The server encountered an error. Please try again in a moment.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.emptyResponse: The AI returned an empty response. Please try again or rephrase your content.
errors.noQuestions: No questions could be parsed from the response. Try adding more detailed content.
errors.inputTooLong: Your content is too long for the AI to process. Please shorten it and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

warnings.truncated: Your content was too long and was automatically shortened before generation. Questions are based on the first portion of your material.

features.title: Built to make studying faster
features.subtitle: Every feature in GenQuiZ is designed around one goal: turn any piece of text into a quiz you can take, review, and reuse — with as little friction as possible.
features.compareSub: A quick comparison against the most common ways people create and take MCQ quizzes.

ctaBanner.title: All of this. For free.
ctaBanner.sub: No account required for AI generation, parsing, or export. Just paste and go.

support.title: Support & FAQ
support.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about GenQuiZ, plus ways to get in touch if something isn't working.
support.contactSub: Pick the channel that works best for you. We aim to respond to all support requests within 48 hours.

ctaBanner.title: Something still not clear?
ctaBanner.sub: The best way to understand GenQuiZ is to just try it — it takes about 10 seconds.

hero.title: How GenQuiZ Works
hero.subtitle: From raw text to a fully interactive quiz in seconds — here's the complete journey your content takes inside GenQuiZ.

flow.title: The Full Code Flow
flow.subtitle: Every step from input to export is handled transparently in the browser and through a serverless AWS Lambda — no data stored, no accounts needed.

step1.title: You paste your study material
step1.description: On the Generate Quiz page, you paste any raw text — lecture notes, a Wikipedia excerpt, a technical article. You also pick a difficulty level (Child → Hard) and how many questions you want (5–10).
step1.detail: DOMPurify sanitises the input in the browser before it ever leaves your device, stripping any unsafe HTML so only clean plain text is sent onward.

step2.title: Your text travels to AWS Lambda
step2.description: The app POSTs your content, difficulty level, and question count to an AWS API Gateway endpoint backed by a Node.js Lambda function.
step2.detail: The Lambda builds a strict system prompt instructing Amazon Nova Pro to produce questions in Aiken format.

step3.title: Amazon Nova Pro writes the questions
step3.description: AWS Bedrock invokes the amazon.nova-pro-v1:0 model with your text as the user message and the format instructions as a system prompt.
step3.detail: Inference parameters are tuned for factual accuracy with a touch of creative phrasing.

step4.title: Aiken format is parsed into structured data
step4.description: The raw model output is handed to extractFromAikenFormat() — a pure TypeScript parser.
step4.detail: The same parser powers the Load Quiz path.

step5.title: You take the quiz, then export what you want
step5.description: MCQMain renders one question at a time, tracking your selected options in global context.
step5.detail: You can cherry-pick questions using checkboxes, then copy the selected set to clipboard or download them as a .txt file.

paths.title: Two Ways to Start a Quiz

ai.title: AI-Powered Generation
ai.desc: Let GenQuiZ write the questions for you using Amazon Nova Pro via AWS Bedrock.
steps: Hit Generate — AI does the rest
Questions appear instantly, ready to attempt

parse.title: Load from Aiken Format
parse.desc: Already have questions written in Aiken format? Skip the AI step entirely.
steps: Paste Aiken-formatted text or upload a .txt / .md file
GenQuiZ parses the format locally — no network call
Questions load straight into quiz mode
Same result, export, and copy features apply

export.title: Your Results, Your Data
export.desc: After completing a quiz, the Result page gives you full control over the questions. Nothing is stored on a server — everything lives in your browser session.

features.label: Re-load the file next time via Load Quiz

ctaBanner.title: Ready to turn your notes into a quiz?
